data.title: A whale is suspected of liquidating 3,418 ETH, with an estimated profit of over $1.32 million.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), a major investor who bought 3,700 ETH in February at approximately $1,973 appears to have liquidated their position. Just one hour ago, they deposited 3,418 ETH into Binance, worth approximately $7.98 million. If this is combined with their previous deposit on April 26th, which is considered a sell order, it suggests they have exited the market entirely. The address's average deposit price was approximately $2,332, representing a two-month return of about 18.2%, with an estimated cumulative profit of approximately $1.328 million.

data.title: Canadian Central Bank Expected to Maintain Interest Rates Amid Rising Inflation Concerns
data.description: On April 29, Jin10 reported that the Royal Bank of Canada anticipates the Bank of Canada will maintain its interest rates unchanged for the fourth consecutive time. Policymakers are closely monitoring the impact of rising energy prices on inflation. The overall CPI for April may exceed the 1% to 3% target range for the first time since December 2023. However, interest rate policies cannot influence global oil prices, and their economic impact is delayed, suggesting the central bank needs to base its monetary policy on future inflation levels rather than current ones. As long as inflation expectations and broader inflation pressures, excluding energy price increases, remain controlled, the Bank of Canada is expected to act cautiously. The Bank of Canada's business outlook survey indicates a rise in inflation expectations, but signs of further slowing in March's 'core' indicators should allow the bank to maintain policy flexibility while assessing new data against its recent forecasts. The first-quarter GDP growth largely aligns with January predictions, and recent data suggests a moderate economic momentum recovery. The labor market also shows signs of stabilization, but the unemployment rate remains low, insufficient to indicate increasing underlying inflation pressures, which means there is limited urgency for further policy adjustments in the short term.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Global Gold ETF Holdings Rise in Q1 2026 Amid High Prices
data.description: On April 29, Jin10 reported that the World Gold Council released its Q1 2026 Global Gold Demand Trends report, indicating a net inflow in global physical gold ETFs, with holdings increasing by 62 tons. According to Jin10, Asian investors significantly contributed by purchasing 84 tons, while holdings in the European and American markets saw a slight decline. The net outflow in Western markets during March reversed the strong inflow seen at the beginning of the year. Despite high gold prices, global gold jewelry consumption demand fell by 23% year-on-year to 300 tons. Major markets worldwide experienced a cooling in gold jewelry demand. However, in terms of consumer spending, gold jewelry demand grew against the trend, suggesting that consumer willingness to purchase gold jewelry remains robust even at historically high prices.

data.title: BitMart contracts will list CLSUSDT, DDOGUSDT, and MDBUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch CLSUSDT, DDOGUSDT, and MDBUSDT perpetual contracts on April 29, 2026 at 17:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 20x.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | India Sees Gold Investment Demand Surpass Jewelry Consumption in March Quarter
data.description: India's gold investment demand surpassed jewelry consumption for the first time in the March quarter, according to Jin10. This shift marks a significant change in the country's gold market dynamics, traditionally dominated by jewelry purchases. The World Gold Council reported this trend, highlighting a growing preference for gold as an investment asset among Indian consumers.

data.title: Japan's JPX Considers Excluding Crypto-Heavy Firms from TOPIX
data.description:
Metaplanet's Bitcoin Strategy Head, Dylan LeClair, announced at the 'Bitcoin 2026' conference that the Japan Exchange Group (JPX) is seeking public feedback on a proposed regulation. According to Foresight News, the regulation aims to exclude companies with over 50% of their assets in cryptocurrencies from the Tokyo Stock Price Index (TOPIX). This proposal could directly affect companies like Metaplanet, Remixpoint, and ANAP Holdings in their plans for inclusion in the October 2026 index.

LeClair urged the global community to sign a joint letter on the Bitcoin for Corporations website, with the public consultation period ending on May 7. He expressed optimism about the outcome, noting Japan's generally pro-Bitcoin regulatory and policy stance.

Previously, the U.S. MSCI decided not to implement an earlier proposal to exclude Digital Asset Reserve Companies (DAT) from the MSCI Global Investable Market Index during its February 2026 index review.

data.title: Syndicate's Commons Bridge Attack Leads to SYND Token Drop
data.description: Syndicate's Commons bridge has been attacked, resulting in a 35% drop in the SYND token's value. According to Foresight News, PeckShield reported the incident, highlighting the significant impact on the token's market performance. Syndicate has assured users that it possesses sufficient tokens to assist those who have lost SYND due to the attack.

data.title: Kyber Network Hacker Moves Stolen Funds to Tornado Cash
data.description: A hacker involved in the Kyber Network breach is reportedly transferring stolen funds to Tornado Cash. According to Foresight News, the hacker, identified as Andean Medjedovic, stole $48.8 million from KyberSwap at the end of 2023. Medjedovic had previously attacked Indexed Finance, stealing $16.5 million. The FBI filed charges against him in 2025.

data.title: Polymarket Account Invests $43,000 on T1 Victory Over Nongshim Red Force
data.description: A Polymarket account with a 53% win rate has invested $43,000 in shares supporting T1 to triumph over Nongshim Red Force. According to NS3.AI, the match is set to commence on April 29 at 16:00 UTC+8.

data.title: Crypto Perpetual Futures Experience $142.2 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
data.description: Crypto perpetual futures have experienced approximately $142.2 million in estimated liquidations over the past 24 hours. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum (ETH) led the liquidations with $69.16 million, followed closely by Bitcoin (BTC) at $67.77 million, and Solana (SOL) at $5.28 million.

data.title: Kyber hackers transferred stolen funds to Tornado Cash; the hackers in question had previously been indicted by the FBI.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, Kyber Network hackers are transferring stolen funds to Tornado Cash. The hacker, Andean Medjedovic, stole $48.8 million from KyberSwap in late 2023 and previously attacked Indexed Finance, stealing $16.5 million. He was indicted by the FBI in 2025.

data.title: Energy Prices Influence Volatility in U.S. Treasurys
data.description: Energy prices have emerged as a significant factor contributing to the volatility in U.S. Treasury markets. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that fluctuations in energy costs are impacting investor sentiment and market dynamics. As energy prices rise, concerns about inflation and economic stability increase, leading to shifts in Treasury yields. Analysts suggest that the correlation between energy prices and Treasury volatility is becoming more pronounced, with potential implications for future market trends. Investors are closely monitoring energy market developments to gauge their impact on Treasury securities and broader financial markets.

data.title: T1 Favored Over Nongshim Red Force in Upcoming League of Legends Match
data.description:
According to Odaily, in the Polymarket prediction event for the 'League of Legends T1 vs. Nongshim Red Force' match, an account with a 53% win rate (address: 0x13414a77a4be48988851c73dfd824d0168e70853) has invested a total of $43,000 on T1 defeating Nongshim Red Force (NS) at an opening price of 75¢. The match is scheduled to begin at 16:00 on April 29, UTC+8.

Historically, T1 and NS have faced each other approximately 26 times in official League of Legends competitions, with T1 holding a significant advantage with 21 wins and 5 losses, translating to a win rate of about 81%. Particularly during the period when Faker was part of the team, T1 consistently secured victories against NS in most series, making the matchup generally favorable for T1. However, NS has occasionally demonstrated the capability to upset T1. In the current LCK regular season standings, T1 is tied for third place with Gen.G, while NS is in sixth place.

data.title: Volvo Car's Earnings Drop Amid Declining EV Sales and Rising Competition
data.description: Volvo Car's earnings have decreased in the first quarter, as the Sweden-based automaker faces challenges with declining electric vehicle (EV) sales in the United States and increasing competition in China. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's struggle to maintain its market position amid these pressures. The decline in U.S. EV sales has impacted Volvo's overall performance, while the competitive landscape in China continues to intensify, posing further challenges for the automaker. Volvo is navigating these difficulties as it seeks to adapt to the evolving automotive market.

data.title: The Korean National Tax Service has begun preparations for taxing virtual assets, with plans to implement it in January next year.
data.description: The Korean National Tax Service has begun preparations for taxing virtual assets, aiming for formal implementation in January 2027 and preparing for the May 2028 comprehensive income tax filing. Under current income tax law, income from the transfer and leasing of virtual assets will be classified as "other income," with a 22% tax rate levied on annual income exceeding 2.5 million won, expected to affect approximately 13.26 million people. The National Tax Service plans to obtain data from exchanges such as Upbit, Bithumb, Coinone, Korbit, and Gopax starting next year to improve the tax infrastructure and promote the launch of a comprehensive virtual asset analysis system within the year. However, controversy surrounding the tax standards and the risk of capital outflow continues. (Edaily)

data.title: Large HYPE Purchase Initiated on Hyperliquid Platform
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, market sources indicate that after HYPE rebounded to around $40, a significant whale with the address starting 0x66f on the Hyperliquid platform has initiated a large-scale purchase of HYPE. The whale has placed two buy orders using the TWAP (Time-Weighted Average Price) method, totaling approximately 250,000 HYPE, valued at around $10.1 million. As of the time of reporting, one of these orders is nearly completed. There is still about $4 million worth of HYPE planned for purchase over the next seven hours at the address 0x66f463866512fc337c89bad2032acbe38ee38836.

data.title: A 53% win rate account purchased for $43,000: LOL T1 defeats NS.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in the Polymarket prediction event "League of Legends T1 vs. Nongshim Red Force," an account with a 53% win rate (address: 0x13414a77a4be48988851c73dfd824d0168e70853) purchased a total of $43,000 in bets on T1 defeating Nongshim Red Force (NS), with an opening price of 75¢. The match will begin at 16:00 Beijing time on April 29th. T1 and NS have faced each other approximately 26 times in official League of Legends matches, with T1 holding a significant advantage with 21 wins and 5 losses, a win rate of approximately 81%. Especially during Faker's tenure, T1 consistently won most series against NS. Historically, T1 has generally had an advantage against NS, but NS has occasionally demonstrated the ability to upset T1. Currently, in the LCK regular season standings, T1 and Gen.G are tied for third, while NS is in sixth place. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Binance Announces Upcoming Live Streaming Sessions Focused on Trading Strategies
data.description:
Binance announced on X that a series of live streaming sessions will be held from April 29 to May 3, featuring various trading experts sharing their insights and strategies. These sessions aim to provide valuable information to traders looking to enhance their skills and understanding of market dynamics.

The lineup includes FF DAO, who will host 'Real Trading Impact' on Wednesday at 13:00. This session will focus on live trading tutorials and strategies that have propelled FF DAO to the top three of Binance's profit leaderboard, currently holding the 11th position. Later on Wednesday, at 20:00, Cang Shen will present 'Battle with the Fed,' offering an in-depth analysis of institutional thinking and contrarian strategies that may not resonate with everyone but are deemed highly practical.

Following this, Ying Ge will lead 'Hammering the Fed' at 22:00, discussing how to achieve tenfold returns through strategic positioning and point analysis. On Thursday, at 10:30, the session 'How to Judge Peaks and Bottoms' will be hosted by the Crypto Godfather, focusing on identifying market highs and lows and responding to sudden market changes. At 16:00, Ba Fang Ge will present 'Trading Structure,' aimed at teaching participants how to avoid losses and achieve results through systematic learning.

Finally, Ethan Wen Zuan U Ge will host 'Live Trading' on Thursday at 18:50, providing guidance on navigating opening trades with a clear strategy. These sessions are designed to offer practical trading insights and are open for registration to become a Binance Square host.

data.title: 100 A-shares hit their daily limit.
data.description: The three major A-share indices opened higher and fluctuated upwards, with the Shanghai Composite Index currently up 0.49%, approaching 4100 points. As of now, 100 stocks in the city have hit their daily limit up. Sectors such as the battery industry chain, rare earth permanent magnets, photovoltaic equipment, phosphate chemicals, media, and precious metals are among the top gainers. (Jinshi)
